name: Random Song
description: Easily get random songs from the editor!

issues.info: Having a problem with the mod? Report the issue on the GitHub repository

auto-search.name: Auto Search
auto-search.description: Automatically search for songs after clicking one of the random song buttons

use-local-library.name: Use Local Library
use-local-library.description: Get music library songs IDs from your local musiclibrary.dat file. If disabled, they will be fetched from an external API instead
